## [00:00 - 01:16]

If we're both archers, right? It's like, I've shot a thousand arrows to be able to hit the bullseye. I look over at you, you've got one arrow. You haven't been shooting this whole time. You're just waiting for the wind to be right. You're waiting for the right time. But then you take a shot and then it hits the bullseye and then you leave. Like I see you do things with such ease. Look, I've seen you work hard too. But I've also seen you move through this in such a, I think your genius is strategy. You're able to find the most effective path with the least resistance. I used to just work hard with no strategy. I shoot a thousand arrows. One of them gets in, I'm like, yeah. Then that means I'll just shoot 20,000 arrows and I'll get 20 in. And that's the kind of way I approached it. But this is what it works. It works, it does work, it does work. But this year has been one of the most highly strategic years of my life. So then I've been able now to reduce the intensity, but when I'm intense, I still get really intense. But the frequency of the arrows going in, it has increased significantly. But that's because I'm now not just working harder. I first learned how to work smarter, then I continue to work harder. Crazy combination. It's a crazy combination, but I didn't have this combination before you. It flipped stuff for me as well. I'm like, I just gotta work a little bit harder with this strategy.
